vocab.meaning: phân hữu cơ giàu chất dinh dưỡng
vocab.example: To ensure a bountiful harvest, I always mix some nutrient-rich compost into the topsoil before planting.
Using high-quality seeds significantly improves the germination rate, even in less-than-ideal weather.

vocab.meaning: dễ bị bệnh bạc lá/bệnh cây
vocab.example: Certain heritage tomato varieties are unfortunately quite susceptible to blight during humid summers.
Living in a high-rise apartment, I’ve had to set up a small hydroponic system to grow fresh herbs without soil.
It is crucial to reduce watering during the plant's dormancy period in winter to prevent root rot.

vocab.meaning: hệ sinh thái tự duy trì
vocab.example: I recently built a closed terrarium, which essentially functions as a miniature, self-sustaining ecosystem.
Lavenders thrive in alkaline soil with excellent drainage, whereas azaleas prefer more acidic conditions.
Sufficient sunlight is the primary engine for the photosynthetic process, allowing plants to convert light into energy.

vocab.meaning: trồng cây bạn đồng hành (trồng xen kẽ để hỗ trợ nhau)
vocab.example: I'm a big advocate of companion planting, such as putting basil near tomatoes to improve their flavor and deter pests.
The roots need a well-aerated medium to prevent them from suffocating in waterlogged earth.
